overview: A production-level Resume Builder SaaS with dual creation modes — a structured form builder and a full TipTap advanced editor. Includes 8 professional templates, Stripe-powered PDF downloads, and a personal dashboard to manage all your resumes.
features: Form-based resume builder with live preview
TipTap advanced editor with rich text formatting
Instant PDF download after payment (jsPDF + html2canvas)
Dashboard with resume management and download history
